commit.message:
fix: Telegram bot improvements — inspect, dedup, context (#54)

* fix: handle Anthropic tool_use finish_reason in agent loop

The agent loop checked for finish_reason == "tool_calls" (OpenAI
format) but Anthropic returns "tool_use". This caused the loop to
break after round 1 without processing tool results, producing
empty responses ("no response generated").

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add /inspect command to Telegram bot

Shows tool actions, sources, and timing from the last query.
Also captures statuses, sources, and perf_trace events from
the chat SSE stream for inspection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: prevent duplicate Telegram messages from Claude Code sessions

[NOTIFY] messages were sent during assistant events AND re-extracted
from the result event, causing duplicates. Now skips re-extraction
when notifications were already sent during the session.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: detect imperative follow-ups for conversation context retention

"look in my email", "check my calendar", "search drive for it" etc.
were not recognized as follow-ups, so the previous question's context
was lost. Added regex pattern for imperative verbs + data source nouns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: add tests for PR review findings; strip PII from /inspect

- Add unit tests for expand_followup_query imperative patterns
- Add tests for orchestrator notification dedup (notifications_sent > 0)
- Move _IMPERATIVE_FOLLOWUP_RE to module level per convention
- Strip tool input args from /inspect output (show tool name only)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
Remove unused AI-korjaukseen button from feedback actions

The ai_fix status on app_feedback has no processing skill — only ai_code
is handled by /ai-feedback-coder. Keep the status config for backward
compat but remove the dead button.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: project x-ray — cleanup, performance, structured output, smart routing

Full-spectrum audit + upgrades from automated X-ray:

Cleanup:
- Remove dead ESLint deps + config (replaced by oxlint)
- Remove scaffold greet() command and deprecated PROVIDER_MODELS shim
- Delete empty dd-ui/dd-typewriter stub crates (0 code, 0 tests)
- Extract pipeline timeouts/retries, prompt healer thresholds to named constants
- Extract shared withTimeout utility (was duplicated in base.ts + dag.ts)
- Move Grimoire URL to VITE_GRIMOIRE_URL env var with fallback

Performance:
- Canvas: disable alpha channel (~2x compositing speedup)
- Canvas: cache ctx + font/baseline (avoid per-frame re-init)
- Canvas: color-batched draw passes (reduce fillStyle thrashing)
- Canvas: textRendering=optimizeSpeed (skip kerning/ligatures)
- SQLite: explicit WAL mode + NORMAL sync + foreign_keys=ON

Reliability:
- Provider-native structured output (Gemini responseSchema, Claude
  tool-use, OpenAI json_schema strict mode)
- JSON schemas for 5 output types (mechanics, character, backgrounds,
  options) — no new dependencies
- Existing 3-layer validation retained as safety net

Intelligence:
- Cost-aware MAB model filtering (flash vs pro tier per callsite)
- Capability-based filtering (structured output requirement)
- 20 new router tests for filtering logic

198 tests pass (178 → 198). Net -3,188 lines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Guard against zero-atom molecules in smiles_to_3d_sdf

SELFIES can occasionally decode to empty/invalid SMILES that RDKit
parses as a molecule with 0 atoms, causing ValueError in EmbedMolecule.
Add GetNumAtoms() == 0 check before and after AddHs.

fix(Matching): 五项反编译细节对齐 — Newton 插值 + stride subsampling + Eigen 阈值 + scale 输出 + auto edge

- Newton 插值公式 d2/(2*dd) 对齐反编译抛物线顶点公式 (§3.5 line 627)
- Stride subsampling 仅中间层，最终层保留全点覆盖
- Eigen 位移阈值 0.5→0.6 对齐 dword_1800D6A8C (0x3F19999A)
- 输出 scale 移除 clamp（反编译 sub_180040150 无 clamp）
- BuildScoreGridFindPeak stride 循环对齐
- auto mode edge threshold: high=1.0, low=2.0（常量表 dword_1800D6AA8/B38 确认）

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

feat: adoption lifecycle — plan before adopting, nag until decided

Adoptions now follow a lifecycle:
  evaluate → plan → pending-approval → active → review → improve/ditch

Key changes:
- "Adopt" recommendation triggers a planning phase, not immediate action
- Adoption plans go to tracking/adoption-plans/[id].md with time
  estimates, risks, hypotheses with confidence levels, and rollback
- Items in pending-approval are re-surfaced every review cycle
- Items pending >7 days get escalated in digests
- Items pending >14 days trigger a direct approve/reject/defer prompt
- Pending items never silently disappear

Force gnina to CPU to avoid VRAM conflict with LLM during GRPO

gnina subprocesses would also grab GPU memory, causing OOM. Setting
CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES="" in the subprocess env forces CPU-only docking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Swagger crash: add type: 'string' to @ApiQuery/@ApiParam with enum

NestJS Swagger's parameter merge logic (mergeImplicitAndExplicit) uses
lodash.assign to merge explicit @ApiQuery/@ApiParam metadata with implicit
reflect-metadata. When @ApiQuery specifies enum: but no type:, the type key
is filtered out (by pickBy/negate(isUndefined)) so assign() never overrides
the reflected design:type — leaving the raw TypeScript string enum object as
param.type. SchemaObjectFactory then calls createFromObjectLiteral on the
enum object, which tries to resolve enum keys as type references and throws
"A circular dependency has been detected (property key: CHARACTER)".

Fix: add type: 'string' to all @ApiQuery and @ApiParam decorators that use
enum: <TsStringEnum> across media, page-views, events, search, translations,
and character-relationships controllers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: missing stocks + SMA200 on intraday/short timeframes

1. Add 15+ missing Korean stocks (IBK, Woori, Hana, SKT, KT, LG Electronics, etc.)
   to both STOCK_SEARCH_DB and TICKER_TO_KOREAN_NAME

2. Fix SMA200 (200-day moving average) not showing on 1D/1W/1M timeframes:
   - Problem: intraday charts only had 5min/15min candles, so SMA(200)
     calculated 200 candles, not 200 DAYS
   - Solution: fetch 2 years of daily data separately (sma200 timeframe)
     and calculate true 200-day SMA, then map by date to intraday chart
   - For 3M+ timeframes, continue using chart data directly (enough points)

commit.message:
Fix sub-assembly weld orientation on impingement plates

Sub-assembly welds (green) were rendering in the wrong plane (Y-Z instead
of X-Y). Added rotation prop to WeldFrame and applied 90° Y-rotation for
vertical-to-horizontal plate joints so the weld frames lie flat around
the correct contact perimeter.

commit.message:
Navigate to dashboard instantly on sign-in, auth completes in background

Firebase Auth can take several seconds to verify credentials. Instead of
blocking the user on the login page during this wait, navigate to the
dashboard immediately and show a loading spinner there while auth finishes.

A sessionStorage flag (authPending) signals the dashboard to hold its
redirect guard open during the in-flight auth request, preventing a
premature redirect back to login.

commit.message:
v31.7: clip ext glows to actual image bounds (fix object-fit:contain margins)

Previous clipPath used full 0,0,100,100 SVG coords, but ext-img uses
object-fit:contain so black pillarbox/letterbox margins exist where the
image doesn't reach. Added updateExtVpClip() which calculates the real
displayed image rect within the container and updates the #ext-vp-clip rect
to match — called on img load, applyViewMode, and sizeAndAlign so it stays
accurate on resize and split-view toggle.

- Add ajWebhook rate limiting to public/surveys, public/contracts/sign
- Fix EmailBison webhook: return 200 on error to prevent retry storms
- Fix Composio signature: cleaner guard with warning when secret unset
- Remove hardcoded "Adam" from voice briefing greeting
- Add admin auth guard for health endpoint ?detailed=true mode
- Add .limit(50) to presence GET query
- Add 5-minute SSE auto-close timeout to activity stream
- Add title/summary input length caps to proposals POST
- Add content validation (required, max 5000) to lead activity POST
- Guard proposal send: return 400 if client has no email address
- Add audit log to public proposal view endpoint
- Fix Vercel connector cache TTL units: ms → seconds (was 166h, now 10min)
- Add .limit(500) to recurring invoices GET
- Add payment link idempotency to sendInvoiceAction (reuse existing link)
- Add escapeHtml() to all user-supplied fields in email/notifications.ts

v31.6: fix admin buttons clipped by switch-picker overflow:hidden

When admin mode is toggled (sun/moon click), toggle .admin-open on
#switch-picker so it switches to height:auto;overflow:visible, allowing
the wrapped button rows to fully show instead of being cut off at 50px.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf: Run auth init in background to prevent 1-min page load delay

Previously, DOMContentLoaded awaited AuthModule.init() which calls
supabase.auth.getSession() - a network request. Users with cached
sessions had to wait ~1 minute for Supabase to respond before
the home screen rendered.

Auth now runs in background (non-blocking). Router.init() and
HomeScreen render immediately. Auth UI updates asynchronously
once session is confirmed.

lightG so deck and side entry cone glows are hard-clipped to the frame.

Introduce react-i18next for full UI localization. All hardcoded
strings across 14 components are now served from translation files
(ja.json / en.json). Browser language is auto-detected and persisted
in localStorage. Hardcoded 'ja-JP' locale in toLocaleTimeString is
replaced with dynamic LOCALE_MAP. A language toggle is added to
Settings. META_LABELS replaced with META_LABEL_KEYS for i18n lookup.
